name: Doc Severinsen
abstract: Carl Hilding "Doc" Severinsen (born July 7, 1927) is an American retired jazz trumpeter who led the NBC Orchestra on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson.

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Findley
about_quotes.evidence: I was on the Jimmy Dorsey band... So I'm on Buddy's band — that was the first meeting. Then I'm on Buddy's band in ’66... So then Doc called me the next day and the rest is history, and that’s when I was on the band.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chuck Findley interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 6, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Bennett
about_quotes.evidence: Hey you know I got a chance to play with Doc. ... He let me go up and play
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Bennett interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 16, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Ed Shaughnessy Part I
about_quotes.evidence: I think he deserves a lot of credit for that because everything comes from the leader... I give Doc full credit for the fact that he made sure 16 people always were like that... It was a wonderful band to play with. Mostly, like I said, because Doc kept a high standard... I always have gotten along
about_quotes.doc_title: Ed Shaughnessy Part I interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, September 1, 1995 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Nick Mondello
about_quotes.evidence: Doc Severinsen and his lady friend ... came to me and said ... would you be interested in working with Doc and I on verifying some of this information ... So I engaged Gio ... So we have started to work on this book
about_quotes.doc_title: Nick Mondello interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 19, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Anne Phillips
about_quotes.evidence: And there I was, 23 years old and brand new in the business, and Milt Hinton, Osie Johnson, Dick Hyman, full string section, Doc Severinsen on trumpet.
about_quotes.doc_title: Anne Phillips interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 24, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Rosengarden
about_quotes.evidence: And in that NBC Band were Doc Severinsen of course... And then Carson came along... Doc Severinsen of course was there... We sat there in that band
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Rosengarden interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 6, 1996
